Q&A

A valid member is a referred player who has completed registration, made a qualifying deposit, and placed valid wagers within the evaluation period.

Your team stage increases when your team meets the required thresholds for total members, active members, and cumulative team wagering volume.

Commission is calculated as a percentage of your downline's valid wagering volume, based on your current team stage and the referral level (Level 1, 2, or 3).

Level 1 members are your direct referrals. Level 2 and Level 3 members are downline referrals from your team, each earning a lower commission tier based on your stage.

Commission rates may vary by game category. Valid wagering from eligible games counts toward your team stage and commission earnings as defined in the program terms.

Q&A

A valid member is a referred player who has completed registration, made a qualifying deposit, and placed valid wagers within the evaluation period.

Your team stage increases when your team meets the required thresholds for total members, active members, and cumulative team wagering volume.

Commission is calculated as a percentage of your downline's valid wagering volume, based on your current team stage and the referral level (Level 1, 2, or 3).

Level 1 members are your direct referrals. Level 2 and Level 3 members are downline referrals from your team, each earning a lower commission tier based on your stage.

Commission rates may vary by game category. Valid wagering from eligible games counts toward your team stage and commission earnings as defined in the program terms.
